layoutRegions.name: archive-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Track archived ledgers, retained closeouts, hash mismatches, and export labels.

layoutRegions.name: ledger-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare archived review ledgers by owner, export label, retrieval state, and proof progress.

layoutRegions.name: archive-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect receipt closeouts, owner acknowledgement history, retry hashes, checksum repairs, export labels, and rollback-safe retrieval commands.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact archive counter with semantic status tone.

components.name: LedgerCard
components.purpose: Archived ledger card showing export label, retrieval state, status, and proof progress.
interactions: status chip maps to archive state

components.name: RetrievalRow
components.purpose: Rollback-safe archive retrieval row with command and bundle proof details.
interactions: retrieval text remains readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
